name: Can I get damages if AI referral led to missing my case deadline?
description: Yes, sue for malpractice damages from missed deadlines due to AI errors.[3][9]

mainEntity.name: Can I get damages if AI referral led to missing my case deadline?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, sue for malpractice damages from missed deadlines due to AI errors.[3][9]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, for negligence causing missed statute of limitations, recoverable as malpractice damages. AI tools speed intake but risk errors like in Mata fake cases.[3][9] Factors: provable loss (e.g., $50k settlement gone), causation, mitigation efforts. Nationwide, average awards $100k+ for deadline misses. Calculate economic/non-economic losses; expert needed.
